description: Sepolia USDC → Falcon USDC bridge. Deposit from the in-app passkey Sepolia wallet (Swap → Bridge USDC In) or any external EVM wallet.

steps: Open Swap → Bridge USDC In and create a Sepolia wallet with your passkey
Fund the Sepolia address with test ETH (gas) and Sepolia USDC
Enter amount and tap Deposit with Passkey (approve + lock in one flow)
Validators attest the deposit and mint Falcon USDC to your Falcon address
deposit_flow.note: No MetaMask required. Sepolia keys are encrypted with your passkey and stored only on this device.
